subcodes.first_line: O patient bird! The power of the love of God is a conquering force and a brilliant might. Assuredly thou hast heard [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طائره صابره روح محبت الله قوه قاهره است و قدرت باهره البته شنیده ای که
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Tahirih [Qurratu'l-'Ayn], @power of faith; power of the spirit
